items.definition_en: A screwdriver is a tool used to turn screws.
items.example_en: I need a screwdriver to fix this loose hinge.

items.definition_en: A paint roller is a tool used for applying paint over large surfaces.
items.example_en: A paint roller makes it easier to paint the walls quickly.

items.definition_en: A step ladder is a portable ladder with flat steps.
items.example_en: She grabbed the step ladder to reach the top shelf.

items.definition_en: An extension cord is a length of electrical cable used to bring power to distant devices.
items.example_en: We used an extension cord to plug in the lamp across the room.

items.definition_en: A caulking gun is a tool used to apply caulk for sealing gaps.
items.example_en: She used a caulking gun to seal the window frame.

items.definition_en: A socket wrench is a tool for tightening or loosening nuts and bolts.
items.example_en: A socket wrench made assembling the furniture much easier.

items.definition_en: A putty knife is a flat tool used for spreading or scraping substances.
items.example_en: He used a putty knife to smooth out the wall filler.

items.definition_en: A level is a tool used to check if a surface is horizontal or vertical.
items.example_en: She used a level to make sure the shelf was straight.

items.definition_en: A wire stripper is a tool for removing insulation from electrical wires.
items.example_en: He used a wire stripper while repairing the lamp cord.

items.definition_en: An adjustable wrench is a tool whose jaw width can be changed.
items.example_en: An adjustable wrench is handy for various nut sizes.

items.definition_en: A workbench is a sturdy table for doing repairs or projects.
items.example_en: He keeps his tools organized on the workbench.

items.definition_en: An allen key is a small tool used to turn hexagonal screws.
items.example_en: You need an allen key to put together this chair.
